prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
T-002's winding temperature sensor (winding_temp_top_c) has shown irregular readings over the past month. Analyze the recent trend and report whether readings are increasing, decreasing, or stable, along with the rate of change and how well the trend fits the data.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the trend direction (increasing, decreasing, or stable), the slope rate per day, and the R-squared fit quality for T-002's winding_temp_top_c sensor.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensor IDs available for T-002.
  Step 2: [iot] list_assets — List all Smart Grid transformer assets with health status 0 (healthy). (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for T-002. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for T-002. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 5: [tsfm] trend_analysis — Compute the trend (slope) of the winding temperature sensor's readings over the past month. (depends on steps [1])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "List all sensor IDs available for T-002.",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-002",
      "task": "List all sensor IDs available for T-002."
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "List all Smart Grid transformer assets with health status 0 (healthy).",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_assets",
    "tool_args": {
      "tool": "list_assets",
      "tool_parameters": {
        "health_status": 0
      }
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-001\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-001\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 2526,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-002\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-002\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Beta\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3317,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-003\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-003\",\n  \"location\": \"Industrial Park A\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3783,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-004\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-004\",\n  \"location\": \"Distribution Center 2\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 4316,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-005\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-005\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3364,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-006\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-006\",\n  \"location\": \"Distribution Center 2\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3608,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-007\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-007\",\n  \"location\": \"Industrial Park A\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3860,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\"\n...[truncated 2170 chars]",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Get the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for T-002.",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "get_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-002",
      "sensor_id": "winding_temp_top_c",
      "unit": "\u00b0C",
      "num_readings": 720,
      "expected_range": "unknown",
      "known_issues": "unknown",
      "rate_of_change": "unknown",
      "trend": "unknown",
      "fit": "unknown"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-002\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 3317,\n  \"health_index\": 1.0,\n  \"fdd_category\": 1,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Healthy \\u2014 no immediate action required.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Get the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for T-002.",

    "tool_args": {

      "get_dga_record": {
        "as_of_date": "2024-01-31",
        "rul_days": 3317,

        "fdd_category": 1,

      },

    "executor_success": true,

  },

    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-002",
      "sensor_id": "winding_temp_top_c",
      "start_time": "2024-01-01",
      "end_time": "2024-02-01"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-002\",\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720,\n  \"start_time\": \"2024-01-01 00:00:00\",\n  \"end_time\": \"2024-01-30 23:00:00\",\n  \"mean_value\": 49.3268,\n  \"min_value\": 18.563,\n  \"max_value\": 78.575,\n  \"slope_per_day\": -0.038495,\n  \"direction\": \"stable\",\n  \"r_squared\": 0.0011\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The winding temperature sensor (winding_temp_top_c) readings for T-002 over the past month are stable, with a rate of change of -0.038495°C per day. The trend fits the data poorly, with an R-squared value of 0.0011.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Steps 2, 3, and 4 are unnecessary for the task and should be removed to improve efficiency."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Steps 2, 3, and 4 are unnecessary for the task and should be removed to improve efficiency.
